name: atelier
description: Universal multi-agent project harness for Claude Code. Run any project — web, data, ML, fintech, CLI — through a structured AI team with rigorous governance, from discovery to release: 8 default agents + project-specific implementers, 11 user skills, 12 hooks across 7 events, 6 hard-enforced gates, GitHub + GitLab forge adapters, machine-readable status JSON, atelier-migrate for safe upgrades, atelier-on-atelier dogfood, and a 3-tier change policy.
